[PDF_PAGE 30 | score=2] Dragons Dragons are an ancient; winged reptilian race They are known and feared for their size, physical prowess, and magical abilities. The 10 sub- species of dragons are identified by the color of their scales. Each sub- species has 12 age categories: The oldest dragons are among the most powerful creatures in the world. Dragons range in size from several feet upon hatching to more than 100 feet after have attained the status of great wyrm. The exact size varies according to age and subspecies A dragon $ wing span is about to its body length and fully 15-20 % of a dragon s body length is its neck; Dragons, especially older ones are generally solitary due to necessity and preference.
